title: Tara Brach
blurb: Creator of RAIN; blends Western psychology with Buddhist practice.
lead: A clinical psychologist and meditation teacher known for weaving psychology and mindfulness into deeply compassionate, practical teachings.

blocks.text: Tara Brach is a psychologist and internationally known meditation teacher who blends Western psychology with Buddhist practice.
She's known for the RAIN practice (Recognise, Allow, Investigate, Nurture) and for teachings on radical acceptance and self-compassion.
Her free weekly talks and guided meditations are a wonderful entry point, and the RAIN practice is a practical tool for hard emotions.

resources.title: Free talks & meditations
resources.whyHere: Extensive free library of guided meditations and talks.
